output:
Completed batch 4 task T6. Final verification passed for the changed ai-timeline-agent code: lint was clean, the throwaway runtime script successfully exercised `resolveClipGenerationIds`, `findShotForGenerations`, and `createGenerationTask` with the new family/input flow, the script was deleted afterward, the full `supabase/functions` edge-unit suite was rerun, and the loop refactor was split so every changed file is now under the ~300-line threshold.

The remaining blocker is deployment confirmation. I attempted `npx supabase functions deploy ai-timeline-agent --project-ref wczysqzxlwdndgxitrvc`, then reran it under a hard timeout wrapper, and the CLI still timed out without returning a remote success/failure result. Diff review stayed within the planned ai-timeline-agent surface for this feature, old `generate` parsing remains backward compatible, and the unchanged 11-test failure baseline is still in unrelated/stale tests.
commands_run: npx supabase functions deploy ai-timeline-agent --project-ref wczysqzxlwdndgxitrvc
python3 - <<'PY' ... npx supabase functions deploy ai-timeline-agent --project-ref wczysqzxlwdndgxitrvc ... PY
deviations: `deno` is not installed in the workspace shell, so verification used `eslint`, a throwaway Node+`tsx/esm` runtime script, and the full Vitest edge-unit suite rather than `deno fmt`/`deno check`.
The full edge unit suite still reports the same 11 pre-existing failures in untouched files and stale create-task tests; I reran the entire suite anyway as required.
The Supabase CLI deployment attempt did not return a remote success/failure result in this environment and timed out, so deploy success could not be confirmed.

task_updates.executor_notes: Final verification completed. ESLint passed across the changed ai-timeline-agent files, a throwaway runtime script imported and exercised `resolveClipGenerationIds`, `findShotForGenerations`, and `createGenerationTask` with the new family/input flow, and the script was deleted after execution. The full edge-unit suite was rerun and still reports the same 11 pre-existing failures outside this feature area. Diff review stayed scoped to the planned ai-timeline-agent files for this feature, old `generate` parsing remains backward compatible, and all changed files are now under the ~300-line threshold after extracting loop helpers into `tool-calls.ts` and `tools/create-task.ts`. Deployment was attempted twice via the Supabase CLI, but the command timed out without returning a success/failure response from the remote service, so deploy success could not be confirmed from this environment.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Type/runtime verification passed for the changed ai-timeline-agent files: lint was clean, the throwaway script successfully exercised the key functions with the new family/input request shape, diff review stayed within the planned ai-timeline-agent surface for this feature, old `generate` parsing still works, and all changed files are now under ~300 lines. The only unresolved part of SC6 is deployment confirmation: the Supabase CLI deploy attempt timed out in this environment before returning a remote success/failure result.
